sentences.arabic: افْتَتَحَتِ الْمَدِينَةُ مَكْتَبَةً عَامَّةً كَبِيرَةً فِي وَسَطِ الْمَرْكَزِ الثَّقَافِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Grad je otvorio veliku javnu biblioteku u srcu kulturnog centra.
sentences.translationEn: The city opened a large public library in the heart of the cultural center.

sentences.arabic: تَحْتَوِي الْمَكْتَبَةُ عَلَى آلَافِ الْكُتُبِ فِي مُخْتَلَفِ الْمَجَالَاتِ الْعِلْمِيَّةِ وَالْأَدَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Biblioteka sadrži hiljade knjiga iz različitih naučnih i književnih oblasti.
sentences.translationEn: The library contains thousands of books in various scientific and literary fields.

sentences.arabic: حَضَرَ حَفْلَ الِافْتِتَاحِ عَدَدٌ كَبِيرٌ مِنَ الْكُتَّابِ وَالْمُثَقَّفِينَ وَالطُّلَّابِ.
sentences.translation: Ceremoniji otvaranja prisustvovao je veliki broj pisaca, intelektualaca i studenata.
sentences.translationEn: A large number of writers, intellectuals, and students attended the opening ceremony.

sentences.arabic: تُقَدِّمُ الْمَكْتَبَةُ أَيْضًا خِدْمَاتٍ مَجَّانِيَّةً لِلْأَطْفَالِ لِتَشْجِيعِهِمْ عَلَى الْقِرَاءَةِ.
sentences.translation: Biblioteka također nudi besplatne usluge za djecu kako bi ih podstakla na čitanje.
sentences.translationEn: The library also offers free services for children to encourage them to read.

sentences.arabic: يُعْتَبَرُ هَذَا الْمَشْرُوعُ خُطْوَةً هَامَّةً لِتَطْوِيرِ الْمُجْتَمَعِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj projekat se smatra važnim korakom za razvoj društva.
sentences.translationEn: This project is considered an important step for the development of society.
